Careers
Good gets even better with a great team.

These are exciting times for EggSolutions Vanderpol’s; we’re preparing for tremendous growth in the near future. With product innovation at the forefront and continuous improvement in everything we do, we invite you to be part of our team.

EggSolutions Vanderpol’s values a safe work environment

EggSolutions Vanderpol’s is a company who values their employees. Located in the Fraser Valley, we are a family owned company proudly servicing local and international customers since 1952. This stability has helped facilitate steady growth, creating many advancement opportunities for employees at all levels.

We constantly look for ways to improve the work environment, provide a safe workplace, communicate company information, encourage employee collaboration, provide ongoing training to assist employees in performing their current job and prepare for career opportunities. Our compensation and benefits package is very competitive.

If you’re driven to make good better, then explore our current career opportunities!
